notes: Base catalog of beasts with inherent stats and traits. Each item has individual properties. Type-level traits apply to all items in category.
Abilities use JSON Reference System v4.1 (@abilities/active/offensive:*)
Level-based ability unlocks provide enemy progression
Wolves have their own dedicated catalog at enemies/wolves/

metadata.usage: Provides base enemy types for pattern generation
